altText: Minimal transparent 64x64 pixel placeholder with a simple 8-color palette, upscaled to 128x128 for preview.
artistNotes: Purpose: quick placeholder assets to unblock frontend development. The 64x64 image is a small transparent PNG intended to serve as a stand-in for real artwork. The 128x128 file is a nearest-neighbor upscale (no smoothing) to preserve crisp pixel edges when previewing. Palette: kept small (<=16 colors) to match constraints. No animation included. Use CSS image-rendering: pixelated or nearest-neighbor sampling to keep edges sharp when scaling in the browser.
